description: List issues in a repository with optional filters and pagination.

state.description: Filter by state: open, closed, or all (GitHub default if omitted).

since.description: Only issues updated at or after this time (ISO 8601 timestamp).

labels.description: Label names to filter by (comma-separated in API; here as an array of names).

sort.description: Sort field: e.g. created, updated, comments.

after.description: Cursor for cursor-based pagination if used by the client.

per_page.description: Number of results per page (max 100 per GitHub API).
